name: Marcus Weber
text: Zain delivered a configurator that genuinely shocked our product team. The rendering quality rivals dedicated desktop software, yet it runs at 60fps in any browser. Our conversion rate jumped 38% in the first month.

name: Sophie Laurent
text: We needed someone who understood both the technical complexity of 3D and the business reality of e-commerce. Zain was that rare combination. The furniture configurator he built is now our single biggest sales driver.

name: James Acheson
text: The watch builder exceeded every expectation. The GLSL shaders he wrote for the metal and crystal materials are indistinguishable from photography at a glance. A true craftsman who takes pride in every polygon.
